messages.content:
Traduci tutto in inglese:

L'uomo si sporge continuando a suonare il campanello con maggior forza.
La donna, allora, lo guarda dall'altra stanza. Ma non si alza per raggiungerlo, anzi. Con la mano chiude lentamente la porta che li separa.

The man leans forward, continuing to ring the doorbell with more force. The woman, then, looks at him from the other room. But she doesn't get up to join him, in fact. With her hand, she slowly closes the door that separates them.
it’s a selfie che si è scattato sulla tribuna di uno stadio.
It's a selfie he took in the stands of a stadium.

We are now in a South American women’s hair salon.
Several women are chatting beneath the hooded hair dryers, mentre il parrucchiere sfoglia un catalogo di tagli a una cliente. Ma la donna non sembra soddisfatta e allora gli mostra il taglio che vuole direttamente dal suo smartphone: è il taglio di un famoso giocatore di calcio.

We are now in a South American women's hair salon. Several women are chatting under hooded hair dryers, while the hairdresser browses through a catalog of haircuts for a client. But the woman doesn't seem satisfied, so she shows him the haircut she wants directly from her smartphone: it's the haircut of a famous football player.

We are in a bar. A bachelorette party is taking place. The bride-to-be sta aprendo le sorprese delle sue amiche: è la maglietta di una squadra di calcio.
La reazione della festeggiata non è per niente soddisfatta, anzi. Sembra che non si aspettasse nulla del genere.
Ma per l'amica che ha fatto il regalo non sembra affatto un problema e se la riprende volentieri: a differenza della futura sposa, lei è una vera hardcore football fan.

We are in a bar. A bachelorette party is taking place. The bride-to-be is opening the surprises from her friends: it's a football team's t-shirt. The celebrant's reaction is not at all satisfied, in fact. It seems like she didn't expect anything like that.

But for the friend who made the gift, it's not a problem at all and she gladly takes it back: unlike the future bride, she is a true hardcore football fan.

Vediamo un gruppo di uomini anziani seduti sulle sedie di legno di un bar.
Uno di loro, improvvisamente, sembra preoccupato. Si alza tastandosi ogni tasca. Quelle davanti dei pantaloni davanti. Quelle dietro.  In quelle della giacca? Nemmeno lì.

We see a group of elderly women, with their ailments, slowly sitting down on the wooden chairs of a bar.
They exchange a worried glance, as though they have suddenly remembered something.
Suddenly, all of them stand up quickly. Or as quickly as they can at least, using their walking sticks to swap places slowly. 
A counter shot shows us the TV in front of them: the Champions League game is about to start and we understand that they are hardcore football fans with their own superstitious rituals.

Correction:

We see a group of elderly men sitting on wooden chairs in a bar. One of them suddenly seems worried. He stands up and checks every pocket. The ones in front of his pants, the ones behind, and even the pockets of his jacket? None there.

A counter shot shows the TV in front of them: the Champions League game is about to start, and we understand that they are hardcore football fans with their own superstitious rituals.

Traduci in inglese:

We see a group of elderly men sitting on wooden chairs in a bar. One of them suddenly seems worried. He stands up and checks every pocket. The ones in front of his pants. The ones behind. What about the pockets of his jacket? Nemmeno.
Eccolo finalmente! L'uomo afferra il suo corno. In quel momento, un controcampo ci mostra la televisione. La partita di Champions League sta per cominciare.
L'uomo bacia il suo porta fortuna e si risiede al suo posto.

We see a group of elderly men sitting on wooden chairs in a bar. One of them suddenly seems worried. He stands up and checks every pocket - the ones in front of his pants, the ones behind, and the pockets of his jacket? Nothing.
Finally, he finds it! The man grabs his horn. At that moment, a counter shot shows us the TV. The Champions League game is about to start.
The man kisses his lucky charm and sits back down in his place.
Anche a chi lo è di natura.
Even to those who are naturally so.
Cheers to all fan. Anche a quelli che lo sono di natura.
Cheers to all fans. Even to those who are naturally so.
Anche a quelli che lo sono per natura.
Cheers to all fans, including those who are fans by nature.
Cheers to all fans. Anche a quelli che non ti aspetti.
Cheers to all fans, even to those you wouldn't expect.
Un fan sarà sempre un fan.
A fan will always be a fan.
